span.p:
multi-layer patch features
F1, F2, ..., FL

div.style: color: rgb(36, 68, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 68, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
anchor layer selection
last or multi-layer mean

div.style: color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
spatial patch tokens
remove CLS, normalize
F={f_i}, H x W x C

div.style: color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
reshape tokens to feature grid
B x C x H x W
replicate padding if needed

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
2 x 2 Haar decomposition
LL, LH, HL, HH

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
bilinear upsample
back to H x W

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
boundary-aware
W = HF * (1 - LF-edge)
then normalize again

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
spectral reliability map W
reliability only, not final score

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
semantic evidence
q_a = S0^gamma
q_n = (1 - S0)^gamma

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
weak spectral modulation
r_a = (1-lambda)+lambda W
r_n = (1-lambda)+lambda(1-W)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
patch evidence weights
omega_a = q_a * r_a^eta
omega_n = q_n * r_n^eta

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
top-k by omega_a
abnormal evidence patches

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
top-k by omega_n
normal evidence patches

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
abnormal visual prototype v_a
weighted patch mean + L2 norm

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
normal visual prototype v_n
weighted patch mean + L2 norm

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
abnormal confidence c_a
mean top-k weight

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
normal confidence c_n
mean top-k weight

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
abnormal update gate
m_a = 1[c_a >= max(tau_a, update_min_conf)]

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
candidate update rates
alpha = alpha0 * c_a * m
beta = beta0 * c_n * m

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
validated asymmetric setting
alpha0 = 0, beta0 small
abnormal prototype usually fixed

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
normal prototype
t_n~ = norm((1-beta)t_n + beta v_n)

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
abnormal candidate
t_a' = norm((1-alpha)t_a + alpha v_a)

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
gated abnormal prototype
t_a~ = m_a t_a' + (1-m_a)t_a

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
per-image calibrated text prototypes
t_n~, t_a~

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
re-score each selected layer
F_l x [t_n~, t_a~] / tau

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
softmax anomaly probability
restore patch grid

color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
global image feature
g x [t_n~, t_a~]

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
